name: devforge
description: A controlled, human-gated agentic coding loop: triage → verify request → explore → architect → [design gate] → implement ↔ review ↔ test → merge confirm → merge, keeping the implementer and reviewer independent. The design gate (plan mode) is the one stop before any source edit; merge is a plain chat confirm. Provides /devforge and the human-only /devforge-approve-design and /devforge-approve-merge.
